annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under C.R.S. 5-12-102 — 8%, compounded annually. This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Colorado’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
